<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 150; 50; 200; 950; 2500
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Higher Caliber; Precise Aiming; Golden Deagle; Double Tap
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 3032133716; 115730014; 3278741672; 3279537687
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; 2;
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
!Level
!Total Price
!Damage
!Firerate
!Range
!DPS
!Cost Efficiency
|-
|0
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|2
|0.808
|14
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|1
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|2
|0.508
|15
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|2
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|5
|0.508
|15
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|3
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|35
|1.208
|18
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|4
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|35
|0.608
|18
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
